title: senecio websteri
intro: Senecio websteri, also known as Webster's geranium or Old man in the mountain, is a flowering plant in the daisy family native to the eastern United States. It contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been found to have medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, however, it should be used with caution due to potential liver toxicity. Herbal preparations of Senecio websteri are typically made from the leaves and flowers, and can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes.
